name: wugtrio
flavor_texts: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.
text: Wugtrio is the Garden Eel Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: gooey, rattled, sand-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 35, Attack: 100, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 70, Speed: 120. Evolution line: wiglett → wugtrio. Lore: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den. A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.
